Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "ZONE7PART3-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zone 7 Part 3.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The .PRG used for this comes from the .T64 file found in GameBase64. This matches the hexdump provided in the Dutch Commodore Dossier magazine issue #11.
